title: Artificial Division
description:
This is a first-person/third-person casual looter-shooter co-op game player can accomplish solo or with other online players.

At the current state the game has

- A medium large map to explore with buildings which player can get inside like a casino, gym, school, police department, bank, mall and feel it`s atmosphere

- A few range and melee weapons that player can use

- A side quests with some cutscenes to dive in the game lore and reveal it secrets about happening in this virtual world.

The game content available in singleplayer and in multiplayer, so solo or multiplayer gamers won`t miss anything from gameplay.
description_short: Online co-op dystopian casual shooter game with some cyberpunk wibe that has some plot in it. A few quest lines that can be completed solo or with friends.
